hostel.mess_timings: Breakfast 7-9 AM, Lunch 12-2 PM, Dinner 7-9 PM

scholarship.government: EBC, OBC, SC/ST scholarships available via MahaDBT portal
scholarship.institute: Merit scholarship for students above 9.0 CGPA

contact.timing: 9 AM to 5 PM, Monday to Saturday

office_locations.admission_office: Ground Floor, Admin Block, near Main Gate
office_locations.placement_cell: First Floor, Training and Placement Block

college_timing: 9 AM to 5 PM, Monday to Saturday

faq.lateral_entry: Yes, lateral entry is available for diploma holders into second year.
faq.nri_quota: Yes, NRI quota seats are available. Contact admissions office for details.
faq.management_quota: Yes, management quota seats are available.
faq.ragging: Ragging is strictly prohibited. Report to anti-ragging committee at 1800-180-5522.
faq.transport: College bus facility available from major areas in Pune. Contact transport office.
faq.sports: Sports facilities include cricket ground, basketball court, indoor badminton, and gym.
